description: Slide-in overlay panel that slides from the right edge. Supports two independent layers (Layer 1 = primary content, Layer 2 = drill-down sub-view that slides over Layer 1). Implemented in ZASidePane.js.

Layer.description: Layer1 = primary pane. Layer2 = secondary/drill-down pane that slides over Layer1, adds a back-navigation bar at the top.

ShowFooter.description: Whether the footer action area (Cancel + Save buttons) is visible.

ShowHelpIcon.description: Shows or hides the help (?) icon in the header.

Title.description: Header title text. Injected via data-header-1 in the DOM.

componentPropertyDefinitions._footerButtons: Footer contains existing Button component instances: 'Cancel' (Primary=No) and 'Save' (Primary=Yes). Override their label by selecting the button on a panel instance and editing its built-in 'x' TEXT property.

anatomy.overlay: Full-page semi-transparent backdrop behind the container (not part of the component itself; added by .sidepane.is-active)

children.layer2-back-bar: Only present in Layer=Layer2. Height 40px. Contains back chevron + parent panel title. Lets user navigate back to Layer 1.

children.header-content: FILL. Contains title (Bold 15px) and optional description (Regular 12px).

body.description: Scrollable content area. Insert any content here.

children.footer-divider: 1px separator between body and footer. Only visible when ShowFooter=Yes.

children.Cancel: Instance of Button component (Primary=No / secondary stroke style). Label: 'Cancel'.
children.Save: Instance of Button component (Primary=Yes / filled blue). Label: 'Save'.

background.description: Main panel background (white in Light mode)

footerBackground.description: Footer and Layer2 back-bar background (slightly tinted)

titleText.description: Panel title, close icon, cancel button text

descriptionText.description: Subtitle text, body placeholder, back-bar label

hardRules: Panel width is 480px by default. Use 320px / 600px for narrow/wide variants.
margin-inline-end MUST be 8px (creates the visible gap on the right edge).
Layer2 MUST show a back-navigation bar (40px, back-arrow + parent panel title).
Only use ShowFooter=No when the panel action is triggered elsewhere (e.g. auto-save or read-only).
Never add fills/backgrounds to the header frame itself — leave transparent; colors come from sidepane-container.
